source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260123 태국 Hollywood, 23G 및 P1 등록서류 - 이창민 팀장님/Digital Flat Panel X-ray/6. Manufacturer Information/Final inspection test report.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Final inspection test reports for Abyz Digital Detector models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides final inspection evidence including supplier product history, mechanical information, electrical safety test results, performance information, and combination test results.
keyPoints: Product name is listed as Abyz Digital Detector for models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
The reports include detector serial numbers A1417MCW2410290005, A1717MCW2412270002, and F1417MCW2501130001.
Electrical safety tests include power input, dielectric strength, protective earth conductor resistance, earth leakage current, touch current, and patient leakage current.
Combination tests include DICOM suitability, console software functions, wired communication, image acquisition, image transmission, and power ON/OFF checks.

concepts.name: DICOM Suitability

A1417MCW is an Abyz Digital Detector model covered by the report.

evidence.claim: Electrical safety testing includes power input, dielectric strength, protective earth conductor resistance, earth leakage current, touch current, and patient leakage current tests.
evidence.evidenceText: 3. Electrical Safety Test Test Tester Final Test Parameter SPEC Result Power Input Test ... Dielectric Strength Test ... Protective Earth Conductor Resistance Test ... Earth Leakage Current Test ... Touch Current Test ... Patient Leakage Current Test

evidence.claim: The performance information test method follows the test method of the test standard, but the specific standard is not named.
evidence.evidenceText: ※ The performance information test method follows the test method of the test standard.

evidence.claim: Combination testing includes DICOM transmission and DICOM output checks.
evidence.evidenceText: DICOM Suitability DICOM must be transmitted. Click Close Study or Send to confirm the DICOM transmission ... It should be DICOM output. Click Print to confirm DICOM Print.

evidence.claim: Combination testing includes console software access control, search, image acquisition, zoom, rotation, contrast control, and partial enlargement checks.
evidence.evidenceText: Console Software Access rights should be appropriately set ... Search function ... Image acquisition ... Zoom in/out ... Rotation ... Contrast control ... Partial enlargement

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal only says overseas.
No named external test standard is identified; the text only states that the performance information test method follows the test method of the test standard.
The combined source contains three model-specific reports with different inspection dates, so documentDate lists all dates present.
Preprocessed text shows OCR/order quality issues such as misspellings and fragmented table layout, including Primary-Enclusure, Patient Appied Part, and mixed Korean text.
